summary: UI Repositioning of Edit Button VERIFIED. The old pencil button (edit-datetime-btn) next to 'Date et heure' has been removed. A new 'Modifier' button (edit-general-info-btn) is now correctly positioned next to the 'Informations générales' title. The button opens the proposal form with all 4 fields (date, duration, type, location). Button visibility correctly respects canEditDatetime() logic - hidden for past appointments.
passed_tests: Old pencil button (edit-datetime-btn) does NOT exist in DOM - REMOVED ✓
New 'Modifier' button (edit-general-info-btn) exists and is visible for future active appointments ✓
Modifier button is correctly positioned next to 'Informations générales' title ✓
Proposal form contains all 4 fields: proposal-datetime-input, proposal-duration-input, proposal-type-select, proposal-location-input ✓
Modifier button is NOT visible for past appointments (canEditDatetime returns false) ✓
'Conditions financières' block has NO edit button - unaffected ✓
'Participants' block has NO edit button (only 'Voir tout' link) - unaffected ✓
critical_code_review_comments: AppointmentDetail.js lines 592-606: Modifier button correctly placed in flex container with 'Informations générales' h2
AppointmentDetail.js line 595: canEditDatetime() check correctly gates button visibility
AppointmentDetail.js lines 260-266: canEditDatetime() correctly checks: not cancelled, no active proposal, not ended
Button styling uses appropriate hover states and transitions
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI repositioning verified. The 'Modifier' button (edit-general-info-btn) is now next to 'Informations générales' title instead of the old pencil icon next to 'Date et heure'. The proposal form and modification flow remain unchanged from iteration_19. Key data-testid values: edit-general-info-btn (new button), proposal-form, proposal-datetime-input, proposal-duration-input, proposal-type-select, proposal-location-input.

verified_features.button_repositioned: Modifier button moved from 'Date et heure' to 'Informations générales' section header
verified_features.old_button_removed: edit-datetime-btn no longer exists in DOM
verified_features.new_button_added: edit-general-info-btn added with pencil icon and 'Modifier' text
verified_features.visibility_logic: Button hidden when canEditDatetime() returns false (cancelled, ended, or active proposal)
verified_features.form_unchanged: Proposal form still has all 4 fields and works correctly
verified_features.other_blocks_unaffected: Conditions financières and Participants blocks have no edit buttons
